meta.law: Transport availability increases monotonically with dimension
meta.bus_spine: AppA <-> AppI <-> AppM (Sigma spine, mandatory, bounded hub budget <= 6)
meta.etv_definition: ETV(e) = (s, kappa, Delta_kappa, d, eta) where d = (Delta_i, Delta_b, Delta_o, Delta_l, Delta_r, Delta_a, Delta_sigma, Delta_lambda, Delta_pi)
meta.tunnel_law: X -> Z* -> Y with sacred hub family {Z*, chi, square, triangle, hexagon, star}
meta.graph_isomorphism: Metro = Mycelium = Neural (one graph under different readings)

layers.name: Zero Family
